Stage 1.description: {{sl.actors.2}} lays with {{sl.actors.0}}'s head resting on {{sl.actors.2}}'s right shoulder and {{sl.actors.1}}'s head resting on the left. Arms and legs are entwined {{sl.actors.2}}'s body.

Stage 2.description: {{sl.actors.0}} and {{sl.actors.1}} snuggle closer. {{sl.actors.2}} lays with {{sl.actors.0}}'s head resting on {{sl.actors.2}}'s right shoulder and {{sl.actors.1}}'s head resting on the left. Arms and legs are entwined {{sl.actors.2}}'s body.

Stage 3.description: {{sl.actors.2}} moves hand to {{sl.actors.0}} and {{sl.actors.1}}'s shoulders. {{sl.actors.2}} lays with {{sl.actors.0}}'s head resting on {{sl.actors.2}}'s right shoulder and {{sl.actors.1}}'s head resting on the left. Arms and legs are entwined {{sl.actors.2}}'s body.

Stage 4.description: {{sl.actors.2}} moves hands to {{sl.actors.0}} and {{sl.actors.1}}'s bottom. {{sl.actors.2}} lays with {{sl.actors.0}}'s head resting on {{sl.actors.2}}'s right shoulder and {{sl.actors.1}}'s head resting on the left. Arms and legs are entwined {{sl.actors.2}}'s body.
